mapper.sql: select task_id, task_no, product_name, delivery_unit, sponsor, handler_name, priority, ai_analysis_count, task_status, review_status, process_flag, current_version_no, main_report_urls, basis_file_urls, appendix_file_urls, submit_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from audit_review_task

select version_id, task_id, version_no, report_file_name, report_file_url, main_report_urls, basis_file_urls, appendix_file_urls, detect_status, submitter, submit_time, ai_summary, review_opinion, current_flag, create_by, create_time from audit_review_version
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0'
and (task_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or product_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and task_status = #{taskStatus}
and review_status = #{reviewStatus}
and submit_time >= concat(#{params.beginSubmitTime}, ' 00:00:00')
and submit_time <= concat(#{params.endSubmitTime}, ' 23:59:59')
order by submit_time desc, task_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into audit_review_task ( task_no, product_name, delivery_unit, sponsor, handler_name, priority, ai_analysis_count, task_status, review_status, process_flag, current_version_no, main_report_urls, basis_file_urls, appendix_file_urls, submit_time, create_by, create_time, remark ) values ( #{taskNo}, #{productName}, #{deliveryUnit}, #{sponsor}, #{handlerName}, #{priority}, #{aiAnalysisCount}, #{taskStatus}, #{reviewStatus}, #{processFlag}, #{currentVersionNo}, #{mainReportUrls}, #{basisFileUrls}, #{appendixFileUrls}, #{submitTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.delete:
delete from audit_review_task where task_id in
#{taskId}
mapper.select: where task_id = #{taskId} order by current_flag desc, submit_time desc, version_id desc
select count(1) from audit_review_version where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.insert: insert into audit_review_version ( task_id, version_no, report_file_name, report_file_url, main_report_urls, basis_file_urls, appendix_file_urls, detect_status, submitter, submit_time, ai_summary, review_opinion, current_flag, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{taskId}, #{versionNo}, #{reportFileName}, #{reportFileUrl}, #{mainReportUrls}, #{basisFileUrls}, #{appendixFileUrls}, #{detectStatus}, #{submitter}, #{submitTime}, #{aiSummary}, #{reviewOpinion}, #{currentFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.delete:
delete from audit_review_version where task_id in
#{taskId}
mapper.select: select stage_id, version_id, stage_code, stage_name, stage_status, stage_time, stage_summary, stage_detail, sort_num from audit_review_stage where version_id = #{versionId} order by sort_num asc, stage_id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into audit_review_stage ( version_id, stage_code, stage_name, stage_status, stage_time, stage_summary, stage_detail, sort_num ) values
(#{item.versionId}, #{item.stageCode}, #{item.stageName}, #{item.stageStatus}, #{item.stageTime}, #{item.stageSummary}, #{item.stageDetail}, #{item.sortNum})
mapper.select: select issue_id, version_id, issue_type, issue_title, issue_content, sort_num from audit_review_issue where version_id = #{versionId} order by sort_num asc, issue_id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into audit_review_issue ( version_id, issue_type, issue_title, issue_content, sort_num ) values
(#{item.versionId}, #{item.issueType}, #{item.issueTitle}, #{item.issueContent}, #{item.sortNum})
mapper.update: update audit_review_task set process_flag = #{processFlag}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where task_id = #{taskId}
